children.text: any other term included in an amendment to the Commodity Exchange Act ( et seq.) made by this subtitle.7 U.S.C. 1

children.heading: Modification of definitions
children.label: b Modification of definitions
children.text: To include transactions and entities that have been structured to evade this subtitle (or an amendment made by this subtitle), the Commodity Futures Trading Commission shall adopt a rule to further define the terms “swap”, “swap dealer”, “major swap participant”, and “eligible contract participant”.
